_note: Manual corrections applied by build_shows.py AFTER merge, keyed by show id. Use when a source returns wrong or missing coordinates (e.g. it matched a same-named venue in another city). Any field here overrides the scraped value. Keys starting with _ are ignored.

ip-26007357._why: Again, Romeo & Jeliet = 大邱本土原創小劇場;NOL/interpark 把未知場館預設 Seoul,實為 DREAM HALL @ 478 Apsansunhwan-ro, Nam-gu, Daegu (대덕문화전당), block-level geocode

bway-39821._why: Source returned Palace Theatre, Manchester UK; corrected to NYC Palace Theatre (1564 Broadway)

bway-42103._why: 沉浸式專用場館,地址即場地識別(2026-07-14 使用者:保留地址、去掉 (immersive) 註解)。座標 OSM 驗證

_tm_note: Ticketmaster start dates = earliest AVAILABLE ticket (expired perfs vanish), not true opening. True run dates below researched from official sites/press 2026-06-12; onsale_only cleared once verified.

tm-anastasia-sydney-lyric._why: Official/press: opened 7 Apr 2026, season through 19 Jul 2026 (TM only sells to 7/18)

tm-the-lion-king-capitol-theatre-sydney._why: Disney/Variety: Sydney season opened 18 Apr 2026 at Capitol Theatre; end kept as TM last scheduled (extended beyond initial 9 Aug)

tm-hair-the-tribal-love-rock-musical-the._why: Theatre Royal Sydney official: 6 Jun – 11 Jul 2026

tm-mj-the-michael-jackson-musical-crown-._why: mjthemusical.com.au: Perth from 6 Jun 2026, until 19 Jul (TM end matches)

tm-monty-python-s-spamalot-planet-royale._why: BWW/press: Planet Royale Perth from 20 May 2026; end kept as TM last scheduled 13 Jun (extended past announced 7 Jun)

tm-tootsie-teatro-at-the-italian-forum._why: Teatro Italian Forum: previews 26 May, opening night 29 May, season to 21 Jun 2026 (TM end matches)

tm-priscilla-queen-of-the-desert-bord-ga._why: Bord Gáis Energy Theatre: 8–13 Jun 2026 (30th anniversary tour)

tm-tera-te-auahi-sir-howard-morrison-cen._why: Press/BWW: premieres Sir Howard Morrison Centre from 10 Jun 2026

tm-mamma-mia-das-hit-musical-auf-schweiz._why: mamma-mia-musical.ch official: MAAG Halle Zürich 06.05.–14.06.2026 (Swiss German production)

_stage_note: Stage Entertainment DE/NL source returns NO run dates → every show read as 'no end' = wrongly long-running. True dates researched 2026-06-25 (per-venue; a theatre runs ONE open-ended show at a time). Open runs keep end_date absent (→ 長期上演); limited runs get end_date (→ 至 X); not-yet-premiered get a future start (→ X 起, hidden until their month).

stage-disneys-der-koenig-der-loewen-hamb._why: Theater im Hafen since Dec 2001, open-ended (25th-anniv 2026, no end planned)

stage-mj-das-michael-jackson-musical-ham._why: Theater an der Elbe since Dec 2024, open-ended

stage-wir-sind-am-leben-berlin._why: Theater des Westens main open run from 21 Mar 2026, no announced end

stage-die-eiskoenigin-stuttgart._why: Apollo Theater since Nov 2021; press (Stuttgarter Ztg): runs until Jan 2027, successor Tanz der Vampire premieres ~20 Mar 2027 at same theatre → effective end ~Jan 2027 (exact final day not yet published, using end of Jan)

stage-die-amme-berlin._why: Theater des Westens Friday-slot limited run, 22 May–31 Jul 2026

stage-zurueck-in-die-zukunft-hamburg._why: Operettenhaus German premiere, defined run 22 Mar–20 Dec 2026

stage-disneys-tarzan-hamburg._why: Neue Flora, closes 25 Oct 2026 (replaced by Devil Wears Prada)

stage-we-will-rock-you-stuttgart._why: Palladium one-season run until ~30 Sep 2026 (replaced by & Juliet)

stage-bibi-tina-weihnachten-berlin._why: Theater des Westens seasonal Christmas show, Nov–Dec 2026 only

stage-salon-rosie-berlin._why: Theater des Westens world premiere 30 Oct 2026 (upcoming as of Jun 2026)

stage-der-teufel-traegt-prada-hamburg._why: Neue Flora German premiere Dec 2026, replacing Tarzan (upcoming)

stage-und-julia-stuttgart._why: Palladium premiere 8 Oct 2026, replacing We Will Rock You (upcoming)

stage-tanz-der-vampire-stuttgart._why: Apollo new production premiere 20 Mar 2027, succeeding Frozen (upcoming)

nl-801cc2fc._why: Beatrix Theater Utrecht Dutch production from autumn 2026, after Moulin Rouge (upcoming; exact date TBA)

tm-i-grieve-different-written-by-and-sta.title: I Grieve Different
tm-i-grieve-different-written-by-and-sta._why: TM listing 名稱是整句行銷文案('I GRIEVE DIFFERENT' written by and starring Harper Jones);正式劇名=I Grieve Different(Harper Jones 自編自演獨角戲)。clean_title 已加通用規則,此為保險。

tour-beauty-and-the-beast-30th-anniversa._why: broadway.org 把 SF 站標成 Curran;官方 BroadwaySF/ATG=Orpheum Theatre(1192 Market St),7/14-8/9。

tm-beauty-and-the-beast-recommended-ages.title: Beauty and the Beast
tm-beauty-and-the-beast-recommended-ages._why: TM 列名帶『- Recommended ages…』購票須知尾巴;DASH_NOTICE_RE 已加通用規則,此為保險。與 broadway.org SF 站同檔期,合併後由 (group,city) 去重。

stage-bibi-tina-weihnachten-berlin-hambu._why: 聖誕限定檔被標長期上演(來源無日期+舊邏輯無日期預設 open run,已改);官方 stage-entertainment.de:2026-11-21~2027-01-03 @Operettenhaus。

atr-libre-melomans-homenaje-nino-bravo-4._why: 『- Melomans - Homenaje Nino Bravo』=團名+副題;與 Madrid 的 Libre 同作品(Nino Bravo 致敬音樂劇),取正式名合併。
